title: Earnings live: Danaher stock plunges on trimmed forecast, 3M stock surges

title: Big Tech's big AI spending is 'a good thing' right now
summary: The Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) led US stocks (^DJI, ^GSPC) to daily gains on Tuesday as chip stocks began to show signs of recovering from last week's sell-off. Investors' eyes are especially wide on Big Tech earnings expected out this week. Prime Capital Financial CIO Will McGough sits down with Josh Lipton to comment on what tech investors will want to see in Alphabet's (GOOG, GOOGL) earnings and the rest of the Magnificent Seven performances.

title: Dow Jones Futures: S&P 500 Regains 50-Day As Sandisk, Micron Soar; Google, Tesla Earnings Due

summary: The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index jumped over 5%, its best single-day gain in a month, as bargain buyers piled onto semiconductor stocks.

title: Morgan Stanley Warns Europe Is Falling Behind: U.S. Will Spend 20 Times More on AI Than All of Europe
summary: Morgan Stanley's latest roundtable reveals a structural gap between the U.S. and Europe in AI investment that no single policy fix can close, and the timeline for when this imbalance reshapes global labor markets is far longer than most analysts expect.

title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Owns Zero Pure-Play AI Stocks. But This 2016 Acquisition Gives It Exposure to the Data Center Boom.
